partiallyFulfills.VAL-BILLING-014: invoice.paid rolls profiles.current_period_start/end now; the usage_counters portion lands when M3 quota-reset-on-invoice-paid adds the usage_counters table. Handler already writes to usage_counters via a no-op UPDATE — the SQL resolves cleanly once the table exists.

whatWasImplemented: src/app/api/stripe/webhook/route.ts — POST handler. Reads raw body via request.text() for signature verification; returns 400 on missing stripe-signature header, malformed header, wrong secret, or timestamp outside the explicit 300s tolerance (Stripe's constructEvent groups all four failure modes under SignatureVerificationError).

Idempotency: INSERT into processed_stripe_events (stripe_event_id PK). Duplicate delivery yields PG error 23505 and the handler short-circuits to 200 {duplicate:true} without re-firing the event dispatcher. Verified with a mutate-and-replay test — trialing marker survives the second delivery.

Event dispatch: checkout.session.completed records subscription id + customer mapping; customer.subscription.created|updated syncs stripe_subscription_id, subscription_status, current_period_start/end, cancel_at_period_end, and plan_id (via stripe_price_id -> plans.id lookup); customer.subscription.deleted flips status='canceled'; invoice.paid rolls profiles.current_period_start/end and attempts the usage_counters reset (harmless no-op pre-M3); invoice.payment_failed flips status='past_due'.
Unknown event types still return 200 so Stripe stops retrying (per Stripe docs).

src/__tests__/stripe-webhook.test.ts — 13 integration tests against live Supabase + signed events via Stripe.webhooks.generateTestHeaderString. Covers signature failures (missing header / malformed / wrong secret / no DB write on rejection), expired timestamp, idempotency replay, all 5 event types end-to-end, and an unknown-customer no-op.
whatWasLeftUndone: VAL-BILLING-014 is partially satisfied — profile-side period rollover works now; usage_counters reset will activate automatically when M3's quota-reset-on-invoice-paid feature adds the table. The webhook already issues the UPDATE (just no-ops silently on a missing relation).
discoveredIssues: Stripe SDK v22 Checkout.Session.subscription can be string | Stripe.Subscription | null — handler unwraps defensively. Similarly Invoice.customer. Typed via narrow interfaces rather than casting to any.
Next.js App Router does NOT require the legacy pages-router raw-body opt-out — request.text() on a Request returns the raw JSON string pre-parse. Verified by the 13 passing signature tests.

Handler failure after a successful processed_stripe_events insert will cause Stripe retries to be swallowed (the duplicate guard prevents re-dispatch). Acceptable for M2; M8 hardening should add a dead-letter table for handler failures so retries can process the event on a future revision.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 260 passed / 1 skipped / 35 files (+13 new). 0 regressions.

manualChecks.action: Webhook signature tolerance: timestamp 6 minutes in the past
Duplicate event_id replay with profile mutation between deliveries
